current_entries.en_definition: At, to, or from a great distance; far away.

current_entries.en_definition: A person with whom someone has an adulterous relationship.

To give, grant, or confer, with a remoter reference to its being the natural result; to provide; to furnish.
(nautical) The act of hiring, or the contract for use of, a vessel, or some part of it, to convey cargo.

current_entries.en_definition: The office or function of an agent; also, the relationship between a principal and that person's agent.

Pleasant to the senses or the mind; pleasing, satisfying, palatable.
An expression of relief, relaxation, comfort, confusion, understanding, wonder, awe, etc. according to uttered inflection.

current_entries.en_definition: (originally, US, informal, derogatory) A foolish, silly, or unintelligent person.

Any of several trees or shrubs of the genus Alnus, belonging to the birch family.

A narrow street or passageway, especially one through the middle of a block giving access to the rear of lots of buildings.

One from whom a person is descended, whether on the father's or mother's side, at any distance of time; a progenitor; a forefather; a forebear.

(intransitive) To dig a tunnel or hole.
Any of several large terrestrial birds of the family Otididae in the order Otidiformes that inhabit dry open country and steppes in the Old World.
(idiomatic) To believe (something, especially something implausible); to accept (a craze, fad, or notion) as valid.
The act of making a purchase.

examples.english: His low salary prevents him from buying the house.
examples.chinese: 因為他的薪水太低，他買不起那棟房子。

current_entries.en_definition: For the purpose of; as a means of; as an instance of; as a type or form of.
One tenth of a nautical mile.
(slang) Excrement.
(slang) Rubbish; anything worthless.
(transitive) To defecate (on); to shit.
(Geordie) To beg.
A chemical element (symbol Cd) with an atomic number of 48: a soft, silvery-white metal.
(anatomy) A cavity open at one end (such as the blind end of a duct), especially a blind pouch connected to the large intestine between the ileum and the colon.
The chemical element (symbol Cs) with an atomic number of 55. It is a soft, gold-colored, highly reactive alkali metal.
The chemical element (Symbol Ca), with an atomic number 20. It is a soft, silvery-white alkaline earth metal which occurs naturally as carbonate in limestone and as silicate in many rocks.
(countable, mathematics) Any formal system in which symbolic expressions are manipulated according to fixed rules.
(uncountable, often, definite, the calculus) Differential calculus and integral calculus considered as a single subject.
(countable, medicine) A stony concretion that forms in a bodily organ.
The length of time between the beginning and end of a year as marked on a calendar, such as from 0:00 January 1 to 24:00 December 31 in the Gregorian calendar.
A strongly radioactive and highly fissile transuranic chemical element (symbol Cf) with an atomic number of 98.
(chiefly, US) To reprimand; to censure severely or angrily.
The state of being calm; tranquillity; silence.
